items.text: integration/hooks.rs promoted to integration/hooks/ folder module with mod.rs and traits.rs.
All existing hook trait tests pass unchanged after module promotion.
HookOutcome has three variants: Proceed, Block { reason }, Modify { updated_input }.
HookOutcome::Modify returned only from PreToolHook. Other pre-hooks return Proceed or Block only.
tool_dispatch.rs handles Modify by replacing model_args and passing serialized modified args to execute_single_tool.
pre_validate receives modified args when HookOutcome::Modify is returned by a pre-tool hook.
HookType enum in error.rs has variants: PreTool, PreLlm, UserPrompt, Stop, SubagentStop, PreCompaction.
Hook enum expanded with variants for all new hook traits (UserPrompt, Stop, Subagent, SessionLifecycle, Compaction, PostToolFailure).
UserPromptHook trait with async on_user_prompt method that returns HookOutcome (Proceed or Block).
StopHook trait with async on_stop method that returns HookOutcome (Proceed or Block).
SubagentHook trait with async on_subagent_start (observational) and on_subagent_stop (returns HookOutcome) methods.
SessionLifecycleHook trait with async on_session_start and on_session_end methods (observational, no return).
CompactionHook trait with async before_compaction method that returns HookOutcome (Proceed or Block).
PostToolFailureHook trait with async after_tool_failure method (observational, no return).
All new traits registered on HookRegistry via Hook enum variants with per-category dispatch methods.

HookEventType closed enum with 13 snake_case names: pre_tool, post_tool, post_tool_failure, pre_llm, post_llm, session_event, user_prompt, stop, subagent_start, subagent_stop, session_start, session_end, pre_compaction.
HookGroupConfig deserializes from JSON with optional matcher field and required hooks array.
HookCommandConfig has required type (command), required command string, and required timeout (seconds).
Timeout field on HookCommandConfig is required with no hardcoded default.
Hooks loaded from ~/.norn/settings.json as user-global scope.
Hooks loaded from .norn/settings.json as project scope.
Hooks loaded from .norn/settings.local.json as local project override scope.
Hook groups concatenated across tiers in priority order (user-global first, local-project last) per event type.
Settings captured at startup; runtime modifications have no effect on current session.
load_hooks_from_settings called in norn-cli builder.rs, registers ShellCommandHook instances on HookRegistry.
ShellCommandHook spawns sh -c <command> with HookInput JSON piped to stdin.
ShellCommandHook enforces configured timeout via tokio::time::timeout; kills child on expiry.
Exit code 0: stdout parsed as JSON HookOutput and mapped to HookOutcome.
Exit code 2: HookOutcome::Block returned with stderr as reason.
Other exit codes: warning logged, HookOutcome::Proceed returned.
Empty or non-JSON stdout on exit 0: HookOutcome::Proceed returned (graceful degradation).
ShellCommandHook checks matcher before spawning; returns Proceed immediately on no match.
HookInput contains common fields: session_id, cwd, hook_event_name, agent_id, profile_name.
Tool-event HookInput includes tool_name, tool_input, tool_call_id.
Post-tool HookInput includes tool_output, tool_duration_ms, tool_is_error.
LLM-event HookInput includes model and message_count.
Stop HookInput includes final_text.
Subagent HookInput includes subagent_id and subagent_type.
HookOutput for pre_tool supports decision field with values proceed, block, modify.
HookOutput for pre_tool with decision=modify requires updated_input field.
HookOutput for other blocking events supports decision field with values proceed, block.
Environment variables NORN_PROJECT_DIR, NORN_SESSION_ID, NORN_AGENT_ID, NORN_PROFILE, NORN_HOOK_EVENT set on shell hook child process.
Shell session event hooks fire via tokio::spawn with timeout (fire-and-forget).
Trait-based SessionEventHook implementations dispatched synchronously in registration order.
Non-reentrant runtime guard on HookRegistry prevents recursive session event hook dispatch.
HookMatcher compiles regex pattern at settings load time.
Invalid regex pattern rejected as config error at startup.
Tool events (pre_tool, post_tool, post_tool_failure) match against tool name.
LLM events (pre_llm, post_llm) match against model name.
Subagent events (subagent_start, subagent_stop) match against profile name or agent type.
Session events match against event variant name.
Absent matcher, empty string, or * matches all events of that type.
Events without matcher support (user_prompt, stop, session_start, session_end, pre_compaction) always fire when registered.
UserPromptHook dispatched at the entry of run_agent_step before initial message construction.
StopHook dispatched after the final iteration before AgentStepResult is returned.
SubagentHook on_subagent_start dispatched in spawn.rs launch function.
SubagentHook on_subagent_stop dispatched in spawn.rs finish function.
CompactionHook dispatched in compaction.rs before compaction event is appended.
PostToolFailureHook dispatched in tool_dispatch.rs when tool output contains an error.
SessionLifecycleHook on_session_start dispatched in norn-cli runtime at session construction.
SessionLifecycleHook on_session_end dispatched in norn-cli runtime at session teardown.
